ref: Now listen! A farmer went out to scatter seed in a field.
text: Ɔɣere ma sɔ, “Kpɛ̃dze ɔwɛ̃ ɔsɛ ɔraɖui kasakɔ̃.

ref: “Jesus from Nazareth, what do you want with us? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are! You are God's Holy One.”

translated: They crucified him, saying, “Jesus of Nazareth, why have you forsaken me? He said he could save others. But he cannot save himself. Let us see if Elijah will come to take him down.”

translated: The Lord with the gathered people, Jesus spoke truly, and with the will of God in the spirit, he said to them, "I give you peace, do not let your hearts be troubled."

ref: I promise you God in heaven will allow whatever you allow on earth, but God will not allow anything you don't allow.
